partitions.selection_rule: Assign the majority of frozen synapse-axis candidates to train with a fixed seed after cutoff filtering.
partitions.leakage_rule: Training rows must use only the pre-cutoff synapse dataset and must not expose held-out follow-up labels.

partitions.selection_rule: Assign a deterministic validation slice after the train split is fixed.
partitions.leakage_rule: Validation rows may support model tuning but must remain isolated from post-cutoff labels outside the validation slice.

partitions.selection_rule: Assign the remaining synapse-axis genes to a held-out test partition.
partitions.leakage_rule: Test rows remain sealed until scoring time and must not influence ranking construction or thresholding.

description: Deterministic gene-level split manifest for the frozen interneuron synapse ranking dataset.
notes: The manifest fixes the split contract without embedding label information inside the ranking dataset.
